name: alpha_001_quality_reversal
expr: rank(hump(add(multiply(0.6, add(group_zscore(divide(fnd6_newa1v1300_ni, fnd6_newa1v1300_seq + 0.001), subindustry), group_zscore(divide(fnd6_newa1v1300_gp, fnd6_newa1v1300_at + 0.001), subindustry))), multiply(0.4, reverse(ts_mean(returns, 10)))), 0.01))

name: alpha_002_margin_turn_revert
expr: rank(hump(add(multiply(0.55, add(group_rank(divide(fnd6_newa1v1300_gp, fnd6_newa1v1300_revt + 0.001), subindustry), group_rank(divide(fnd6_newa1v1300_revt, fnd6_newa1v1300_at + 0.001), subindustry))), multiply(0.45, reverse(ts_mean(returns, 5)))), 0.01))

name: alpha_003_cashflow_quality
expr: rank(hump(add(multiply(0.65, add(group_zscore(divide(fnd6_newa1v1300_oancf, fnd6_newa1v1300_at + 0.001), subindustry), group_zscore(divide(subtract(fnd6_newa1v1300_gp, fnd6_newa1v1300_xsga), fnd6_newa1v1300_at + 0.001), subindustry))), multiply(0.35, reverse(ts_mean(returns, 15)))), 0.01))

name: alpha_004_conservative_quality
expr: rank(hump(add(multiply(0.6, add(group_rank(divide(fnd6_newa1v1300_ni, fnd6_newa1v1300_at + 0.001), subindustry), reverse(group_rank(divide(add(fnd6_newa1v1300_rect, fnd6_newa1v1300_invt), fnd6_newa1v1300_at + 0.001), subindustry)))), multiply(0.4, reverse(ts_mean(returns, 20)))), 0.01))

name: alpha_005_backfill_quality_rev
expr: rank(hump(add(multiply(0.58, add(group_zscore(group_backfill(divide(fnd6_newa1v1300_gp, fnd6_newa1v1300_revt + 0.001), subindustry, 252), subindustry), group_zscore(group_backfill(divide(fnd6_newa1v1300_oancf, fnd6_newa1v1300_at + 0.001), subindustry, 252), subindustry))), multiply(0.42, reverse(ts_mean(returns, 7)))), 0.01))

name: alpha_006_profitability_stability
expr: rank(hump(add(multiply(0.6, add(group_rank(divide(fnd6_newa1v1300_ebit, fnd6_newa1v1300_at + 0.001), subindustry), reverse(group_rank(divide(fnd6_newa1v1300_xint, fnd6_newa1v1300_at + 0.001), subindustry)))), multiply(0.4, reverse(ts_mean(returns, 12)))), 0.01))
